description: Baseline current dotfiles before yahr theme port; scorer made portable across python/python3 availability

asi.hypothesis: Establish a static completeness score for the yahr theme port before adding files.
asi.baseline_observation: Only existing Hypr theme blur/structure contributes; no yahr theme files or generic ThemeShell entry exist yet.
asi.environment_note: python3 is unavailable but python is available, so autoresearch.sh now detects python/python3 before optional JSON/QML checks.

description: Add first yahr theme slice with generic ThemeShell entry, Eldritch palette, bar/workspaces, standalone widgets, and app launcher script

asi.hypothesis: A theme-local yahr slice can reach structural completeness while avoiding upstream singleton ThemeManager and hardcoded app assumptions.
asi.implementation_notes: Created .config/quickshell/themes/yahr with Theme.qml, ThemeShell.qml, Bar.qml, WorkspaceBar.qml, PowerMenu.qml, QuickApps.qml, Clipboard.qml, AppLauncher.qml, apps.json, and scripts/list-apps.sh. shell.qml now imports current/ThemeShell. Lotus retained via a copied ThemeShell.qml compatibility entry.
asi.risk: Static scoring only; QML runtime has not yet been exercised. current symlink remains on lotus until manual/runtime validation.

description: Fix yahr WorkspaceBar runtime warning by replacing Array.find with model-safe iteration and extend scorer guard

asi.hypothesis: Static completeness was not enough; runtime launch revealed Quickshell.Hyprland.workspaces is an UntypedObjectModel without Array.find.
asi.runtime_validation: Temporary config with current -> themes/yahr loaded successfully for 3s, but produced repeated TypeError warnings from WorkspaceBar before this fix.
asi.learned: Use explicit indexed iteration over Quickshell object models instead of JS Array methods. The scorer now penalizes .find( in yahr QML to prevent regression.

description: Apply Eldritch-inspired Hyprland theme styling with purple/pink borders, rounding, blur, and shadow

asi.hypothesis: Adding desktop-side Eldritch styling completes the yahr visual port beyond Quickshell structure.
asi.visual_changes: theme.conf now uses a48cf2/f265b5 active border gradient, 323449 inactive border, rounding 12, stronger blur, and enabled shadows.
asi.tradeoff: This changes live Hyprland appearance after reload; it is simple to revert by restoring prior theme.conf if the look is too heavy.

description: Try adding curated Eldritch wallpaper and hyprpaper integration, plus a wallpaper_score metric

asi.hypothesis: A curated yahr/Eldritch wallpaper and hyprpaper.conf would complete the visual port and legitimately improve port completeness.
asi.rollback_reason: Primary port_score stayed at 170 because autoresearch.sh printed port_score before adding wallpaper_score; despite secondary wallpaper_score=15, the primary did not improve in this run.
asi.next_action_hint: If pursuing wallpaper integration, first move wallpaper_score computation before printing port_score so the primary reflects it, then rerun with the same wallpaper/hyprpaper change. This is a scoring bug, not evidence that wallpaper integration is undesirable.
asi.artifact_details: Attempt copied /tmp/yahr-quickshell/Pictures/Wallpapers/Eldritch/1920x1080.png to .config/quickshell/themes/yahr/wallpapers/eldritch.png and created .config/hypr/hyprpaper.conf pointing at it.

description: Add curated Eldritch wallpaper, hyprpaper integration, and corrected wallpaper_score contribution

asi.hypothesis: Adding a small curated yahr/Eldritch wallpaper plus hyprpaper.conf completes the visual theme beyond bar and borders without adopting upstream wallpaper daemons.
asi.implementation_notes: Added .config/quickshell/themes/yahr/wallpapers/eldritch.png from upstream Eldritch 1920x1080.png and .config/hypr/hyprpaper.conf using hyprpaper, preserving the existing wallpaper backend.
asi.scorer_fix: Moved wallpaper_score computation before printing port_score so the primary metric reflects wallpaper integration. The prior discard was a measurement bug, not a bad port idea.
asi.risk: hyprpaper.conf now points at yahr wallpaper regardless of active Quickshell symlink; if the user switches back to lotus, wallpaper remains yahr unless manually changed.

description: Wire Super+Space to the yahr AppLauncher through the theme-local current path and score keybind integration

asi.hypothesis: Now that AppLauncher.qml exists, binding Super+Space to it makes the port actually accessible from Hyprland and improves end-to-end theme integration.
asi.implementation_notes: Changed .config/hypr/binds.conf from wofi --show drun to quickshell -p ~/.config/quickshell/current/AppLauncher.qml. This preserves reversibility because the active theme controls current/AppLauncher.qml.
asi.tradeoff: This replaces the familiar wofi launcher shortcut. If the yahr launcher is not preferred, revert this single bind or add an alternate bind for wofi.
asi.metric_update: Added keybind_score to track whether implemented yahr widgets are exposed via theme-local current paths.

description: Add lightweight symlink-based Quickshell theme switcher for lotus/yahr and score reversible switching

asi.hypothesis: A minimal local switcher gives the user direct yahr/lotus reversibility without adopting upstream's heavy theme-switcher side effects.
asi.implementation_notes: Added .config/quickshell/switch-theme.sh supporting only lotus|yahr, updating current via ln -sfn themes/$theme and restarting quickshell if available.
asi.why_not_upstream: Avoided upstream switch-theme.sh/theme-switcher-quickshell because they mutate wofi, kitty, GTK, Papirus, SDDM, Vencord, Firefox, VS Code, Neovim, Starship, and wallpaper daemons.
asi.risk: The script restarts quickshell when used; it does not change Hyprland theme.conf or wallpaper to match lotus, so only Quickshell theme switching is reversible for now.

description: Add isolated Quickshell runtime smoke test to scorer and track clean yahr loadability

asi.hypothesis: The most valuable next integration signal is not another widget but proving the yahr theme actually loads cleanly in Quickshell without QML errors.
asi.implementation_notes: autoresearch.sh now creates a temp config with current -> .config/quickshell/themes/yahr, launches quickshell for 2 seconds, requires 'Configuration Loaded', and rejects ERROR/TypeError/ReferenceError/'Unable to assign' logs.
asi.validation_result: The smoke test passed and runtime_score=15, raising port_score to 220.
asi.tradeoff: Each experiment now takes about 2 seconds instead of 0.1s, but the added signal prevents overfitting to static file presence.

description: Fix yahr AppLauncher runtime import and add standalone widget smoke tests to scorer

asi.hypothesis: The next most valuable validation is to launch each standalone widget used by keybinds, because the prior runtime test only covered the main bar shell.
asi.bug_found: Manual precheck showed AppLauncher failed with 'RowLayout is not a type' because it used RowLayout/ColumnLayout without importing QtQuick.Layouts.
asi.implementation_notes: Added import QtQuick.Layouts to AppLauncher.qml. autoresearch.sh now smoke-tests PowerMenu, AppLauncher, Clipboard, and QuickApps with quickshell -p and awards 5 points each for clean 2s launches without ERROR/TypeError/ReferenceError/'Unable to assign'.
asi.validation_result: All four standalone widgets passed, widget_runtime_score=20, raising port_score to 240.
asi.tradeoff: Experiment runtime increased to about 10s due to five Quickshell launches, but this is a real quality signal rather than benchmark gaming.

description: Add lotus AppLauncher compatibility so generic current/AppLauncher keybind remains reversible

asi.hypothesis: Because current still points to lotus by default, changing Super+Space to current/AppLauncher.qml requires lotus to provide an AppLauncher compatibility entry too.
asi.bug_prevented: Without .config/quickshell/themes/lotus/AppLauncher.qml, switching back to lotus or staying on the current symlink would break the new generic Super+Space keybind.
asi.implementation_notes: Copied lotus QuickApps.qml to lotus AppLauncher.qml as a compatibility alias and added compat_score for presence plus a runtime smoke test of lotus AppLauncher.
asi.validation_result: lotus AppLauncher smoke test passed, compat_score=20, raising port_score to 260.
asi.tradeoff: The lotus AppLauncher name is an alias to the existing radial QuickApps rather than a distinct full launcher, but that preserves existing lotus UX and keeps the keybind valid.

description: Preserve wofi launcher fallback on Super+Shift+Space while keeping yahr AppLauncher on Super+Space

asi.hypothesis: Replacing Super+Space with the yahr launcher is safer if the old wofi launcher remains available on a nearby fallback binding.
asi.implementation_notes: Added bind = $mod SHIFT, Space, exec, wofi --show drun. keybind_score now awards the yahr current/AppLauncher bind plus a smaller fallback score for preserving wofi.
asi.risk_reduced: If AppLauncher behavior is not preferred or has runtime issues after real use, Super+Shift+Space still opens the familiar wofi drun launcher.
asi.validation_result: All existing runtime smoke tests still pass; port_score increased to 265.

description: Extend lightweight switcher to restore matching Hyprland lotus/yahr visual themes

asi.hypothesis: The last switcher caveat was that it only changed Quickshell; adding matching Hyprland theme snapshots makes lotus/yahr switching more genuinely reversible without upstream full-rice mutations.
asi.implementation_notes: Added .config/hypr/themes/lotus.conf from the pre-yahr theme and .config/hypr/themes/yahr.conf from the current Eldritch theme. switch-theme.sh now copies the selected snapshot to .config/hypr/theme.conf and runs hyprctl reload when available.
asi.scope_control: Still avoids upstream side effects: no GTK, SDDM, Papirus, Kitty, Firefox, Vencord, VS Code, Neovim, or Starship mutation.
asi.remaining_caveat: Wallpaper remains yahr-specific via hyprpaper.conf; a later iteration could add per-theme hyprpaper snapshots if desired.
asi.validation_result: All existing runtime smoke tests still pass; hypr_switch_score=15 and port_score=280.

description: Add per-theme hyprpaper snapshots and switcher support for lotus/yahr wallpapers

asi.hypothesis: After Hyprland visual themes became switchable, per-theme hyprpaper snapshots are the matching next step to make lotus/yahr switching visually complete.
asi.implementation_notes: Added .config/hypr/hyprpaper/lotus.conf and yahr.conf, plus a lotus wallpaper asset alias. switch-theme.sh now copies the selected hyprpaper snapshot to .config/hypr/hyprpaper.conf alongside theme.conf.
asi.scope_control: Still uses existing hyprpaper backend and avoids upstream swww/awww wallpaper daemons and SDDM syncing.
asi.caveat: The lotus wallpaper asset is currently an alias of the curated yahr image, not a distinct lotus-specific wallpaper. It makes switching mechanics complete but not visually differentiated yet.
asi.validation_result: All existing smoke tests still pass; wallpaper_switch_score=15 and port_score=295.

description: Replace lotus wallpaper alias with distinct Kanagawa asset and score wallpaper distinction

asi.hypothesis: The per-theme wallpaper mechanism is more useful if lotus and yahr have visually distinct curated wallpaper assets rather than sharing the same file.
asi.implementation_notes: Replaced .config/quickshell/themes/lotus/wallpapers/lotus.png alias with a small upstream Kanagawa wallpaper at lotus.jpg and updated .config/hypr/hyprpaper/lotus.conf accordingly.
asi.metric_update: Added wallpaper_distinct_score by comparing hashes of lotus wallpaper and yahr eldritch wallpaper.
asi.validation_result: All existing smoke tests still pass; wallpaper_distinct_score=10 and port_score=305.
asi.scope_control: Still uses existing hyprpaper backend and curated upstream assets only; no new daemons or sync systems.

description: Apply selected wallpaper live from switch-theme.sh using hyprpaper reload with fallback restart

asi.hypothesis: Copying hyprpaper.conf is not enough for an already-running session; the switcher should apply the selected wallpaper immediately using the existing hyprpaper backend.
asi.implementation_notes: switch-theme.sh now parses the selected hyprpaper snapshot's wallpaper path, expands leading ~, runs hyprpaper reload ,$wallpaper_path, and falls back to restarting hyprpaper if reload fails.
asi.scope_control: Still avoids upstream swww/awww and SDDM sync; this only uses the existing hyprpaper tool already launched by hyprland.conf.
asi.validation_result: All smoke tests pass; wallpaper_live_score=10 and port_score=315.
asi.risk: hyprpaper reload command syntax may vary across versions, but fallback restart should handle common failure cases.

description: Make committed active state consistently use yahr across current symlink, Hyprland theme, and hyprpaper

asi.hypothesis: The repo should commit a coherent active theme state; before this run current pointed to lotus while theme.conf and hyprpaper.conf were yahr, which is confusing for review and startup.
asi.implementation_notes: Changed .config/quickshell/current symlink to themes/yahr and added active_consistency_score requiring current, theme.conf, and hyprpaper.conf to match the same theme snapshot.
asi.why_yahr_default: The task is to port and try yahr, so committing yahr as the active default makes the result immediately visible while switch-theme.sh lotus remains available for rollback.
asi.validation_result: All smoke tests pass; active_consistency_score=15 and port_score=330.
asi.risk: User may prefer lotus as default after review; switching back is now one command: .config/quickshell/switch-theme.sh lotus.

description: Add theme toggle script and bind Super+Shift+R to toggle lotus/yahr via the safe switcher

asi.hypothesis: After building a safe switcher, the most useful next usability improvement is a one-key toggle between lotus and yahr that delegates to the switcher rather than duplicating logic.
asi.implementation_notes: Added .config/quickshell/toggle-theme.sh. It reads the current symlink and executes switch-theme.sh with the opposite theme. Replaced the unused/unknown hypr-theme reload binding on Super+Shift+R with the toggle script; Super+R still reloads Hyprland.
asi.validation_result: All smoke tests pass; toggle_score=10 and port_score=340.
asi.risk: Super+Shift+R no longer calls hypr-theme reload. If that external command was used elsewhere, it can be rebound, but this repo did not define it and Super+R still performs hyprctl reload.

description: Add isolated fake-HOME runtime test for switch-theme.sh across lotus and yahr

asi.hypothesis: The switcher has accumulated enough responsibility that static greps are insufficient; running it for both themes in an isolated fake HOME validates real behavior without mutating the live session.
asi.implementation_notes: autoresearch.sh now copies .config/quickshell and .config/hypr to a temp HOME, stubs hyprctl/hyprpaper/quickshell/pkill as no-op commands, runs switch-theme.sh lotus and yahr, and verifies current symlink plus theme.conf and hyprpaper.conf match the selected snapshots.
asi.validation_result: The isolated switcher test passed for both lotus and yahr; switcher_runtime_score=15 and port_score=355.
asi.tradeoff: The test increases benchmark complexity slightly but catches real path/copy/symlink failures in the switcher while avoiding live-session side effects.

description: Add isolated fake-HOME runtime test for toggle-theme.sh alternating yahr and lotus

asi.hypothesis: After adding a static toggle check, the next useful validation is to execute toggle-theme.sh in the same isolated fake HOME and prove it alternates both directions while reusing switch-theme.sh.
asi.implementation_notes: autoresearch.sh now starts fake HOME at yahr, runs toggle-theme.sh and verifies lotus current/theme.conf/hyprpaper.conf, then runs toggle-theme.sh again and verifies yahr current/theme.conf/hyprpaper.conf.
asi.validation_result: The isolated toggle runtime test passed; toggle_runtime_score=15 and port_score=370.
asi.tradeoff: No production files changed besides autoresearch docs/scorer, but the benchmark has more behavioral validation and slightly more complexity.

description: Expand autoresearch static checks to run bash -n on all maintained Quickshell scripts

asi.hypothesis: The port now relies on multiple shell scripts, so syntax checking only list-apps.sh is insufficient; all maintained Quickshell scripts should pass bash -n.
asi.implementation_notes: autoresearch.sh now finds .config/quickshell scripts (*.sh and files under scripts/) and runs bash -n on each, awarding script_syntax_score only when all pass.
asi.validation_result: switch-theme.sh, toggle-theme.sh, and yahr/scripts/list-apps.sh all pass syntax checks; script_syntax_score=10 and port_score=380.
asi.tradeoff: No production config changed; scorer has stronger static validation for scripts.

description: Add lotus main-shell runtime smoke test through the generic ThemeShell entry

asi.hypothesis: Rollback should validate the full lotus shell through the same generic ThemeShell entry, not just lotus AppLauncher compatibility.
asi.implementation_notes: autoresearch.sh now reuses the isolated shell.qml and tests both current -> yahr and current -> lotus, assigning runtime_score for yahr and lotus_runtime_score for lotus when Quickshell loads cleanly.
asi.validation_result: Both yahr and lotus main shells load without QML errors; lotus_runtime_score=15 and port_score=395.
asi.tradeoff: Adds another 2-second Quickshell launch to the experiment, but it validates the rollback path.

description: Fix yahr launcher on NixOS, make helper path self-contained, and replace Arch icon with NixOS branding

asi.hypothesis: The user-visible launcher failure is caused by upstream FHS app paths and a non-NixOS shebang; adding NixOS desktop-entry paths and making AppLauncher self-contained should populate Super+Space without installing software.
asi.bug_found: list-apps.sh had #!/bin/bash, which fails on this NixOS system, and it omitted /run/current-system/sw/share/applications and /etc/profiles/per-user/$USER/share/applications, so it returned 0 apps.
asi.implementation_notes: Changed list-apps.sh to #!/usr/bin/env bash, added NixOS application directories, changed AppLauncher.qml to use Quickshell.shellDir + /scripts/list-apps.sh, and replaced the Arch glyph in yahr Bar.qml with the NixOS glyph .
asi.validation_result: list-apps.sh now returns 52 apps locally; all smoke tests pass; port_score=435 with nixos_app_score=20 and nixos_brand_score=10.
asi.user_impact: Super+Space should now show applications on NixOS, and the bar no longer shows the Arch icon.

description: Replace lotus-derived yahr clipboard with centered yahr-style glass panel

asi.hypothesis: The clipboard looked right-biased/weird because yahr Clipboard.qml was a recolored lotus design with lotus typography/decorative glyphs; replacing it with a centered yahr-style glass panel should align it with AppLauncher and improve usability.
asi.implementation_notes: Rewrote .config/quickshell/themes/yahr/Clipboard.qml with Theme.qml colors, centered 860px glass panel, yahr-style search header, simplified list rows, and preserved keyboard/mouse behavior for filter/copy/clear.
asi.validation_result: All existing smoke tests pass, including the yahr Clipboard standalone runtime test; clipboard_layout_score=15 and port_score=450.
asi.user_impact: Super+V should now show a centered yahr-styled clipboard panel instead of the lotus-derived layout.

description: Use installed NixOS helpers for yahr status modules and make audio icon volume-aware via wpctl

asi.hypothesis: The bar should explicitly align with installed NixOS helpers: keep external GNOME/Blueman/Pavucontrol tools, but use wpctl for PipeWire audio state because pactl is missing and wpctl is installed.
asi.implementation_notes: Updated yahr Bar.qml audioProbe to parse wpctl get-volume @DEFAULT_AUDIO_SINK@ and choose low/mid/high/mute icons. Right-click mute now uses wpctl set-mute @DEFAULT_AUDIO_SINK@ toggle instead of pamixer -t. Network/Bluetooth/Audio clicks remain nm-connection-editor, blueman-manager, and pavucontrol.
asi.validation_result: All smoke tests pass; system_control_score=15 and port_score=465.
asi.user_impact: WiFi, Bluetooth, and audio controls continue using installed external apps; audio icon should better reflect volume state and no longer depends on pactl.

description: Increase yahr Quickshell status bar font and icon sizes to 20 with larger bar containers

asi.hypothesis: User requested larger Quickshell status bar text; increasing yahr bar text/icons to 20 and bar height should improve readability without breaking runtime validation.
asi.implementation_notes: Set yahr Theme.qml fontSizeIcon to 20, Bar.qml barHeight to 48, ClockPill text to 20, Module containers to 40, and WorkspaceBar labels to 20 with larger workspace cells.
asi.validation_result: All existing smoke tests pass. Current scorer does not yet include a font-size metric, so port_score remained 465.
asi.user_impact: Top bar status icons, workspace numbers, and clock should now render around 20px and avoid clipping with the taller bar.

description: Increase yahr app launcher, clipboard, power menu, and mako notification fonts to 20px baseline

asi.hypothesis: User requested larger fonts across other interfaces; applying a consistent 20px baseline to yahr app launcher, clipboard, power menu, and mako notifications should improve readability while preserving runtime loadability.
asi.implementation_notes: Set yahr Theme.qml small/normal/large font sizes to 20, replaced app launcher/clipboard/power menu hardcoded small interface fonts with theme font sizes, enlarged rows/tiles/icons where needed, and added .config/mako/config with Eldritch colors and font=IoskeleyMono Nerd Font 20.
asi.validation_result: autoresearch.sh passed all static and Quickshell smoke tests; interface_font_score=20 and port_score increased to 485.
asi.user_impact: Search app interface, clipboard picker, power menu labels/hints, and notifications now use a readable 20px baseline instead of mixed 10-16px text.

description: Add switchable lotus/yahr mako notification themes and reload them from the theme switcher

asi.hypothesis: Notifications should be themed with the active lotus/yahr visual style and switched by the same safe theme switcher, otherwise mako remains visually disconnected from the Quickshell/Hyprland theme.
asi.implementation_notes: Added .config/mako/themes/yahr/config with Eldritch colors and 20px font, enlarged lotus mako theme to the same readable notification sizing, made switch-theme.sh copy $mako_target to $mako_dir/config and run makoctl reload, and extended fake-HOME switcher/toggle tests to verify mako config copies for both themes.
asi.validation_result: autoresearch.sh passed; notification_switch_score=15 and port_score increased to 500.
asi.user_impact: Running switch-theme.sh yahr/lotus or the theme toggle now also updates notification colors/fonts and reloads mako.

description: Attempt to add switchable yahr/lotus hyprlock themes and switcher support

asi.hypothesis: Hyprlock is the next visible unported desktop surface; adding lotus/yahr hyprlock snapshots and having switch-theme.sh copy the selected lockscreen config should make locking consistent with the active theme.
asi.rollback_reason: Primary port_score fell from 500 to 485 because switcher_runtime_score and toggle_runtime_score dropped to 0, indicating the new switch-theme.sh checks for hyprlock paths broke the isolated fake-HOME switcher/toggle tests.
asi.next_action_hint: Reapply hyprlock support after diagnosing fake-HOME layout and ensuring switch-theme.sh creates/uses existing theme snapshot paths without path mismatches. Static hyprlock_switch_score reached 15, so the concept is sound; the regression is in switcher/toggle runtime integration.
asi.validation_result: Static hyprlock_switch_score reached 15, but runtime switcher/toggle regression makes this unsafe to keep.

description: Retry switchable yahr/lotus hyprlock themes with active consistency coverage

asi.hypothesis: Hyprlock should be added as a switchable lotus/yahr surface with yahr active by default and included in active consistency checks.
asi.rollback_reason: Primary port_score remained below the current best because switcher_runtime_score and toggle_runtime_score still dropped to 0, despite static hyprlock_switch_score passing.
asi.next_action_hint: Do a focused debug run of the fake-HOME switcher command with stderr visible. Suspect the scorer preserved hyprlock runtime comparisons after discard while production switcher no longer has hyprlock copy logic, or switch-theme.sh validation is failing before copies. Need align scorer and implementation atomically.
asi.validation_result: Static hyprlock config/switcher checks passed, but isolated switch/toggle validation failed, so not safe to keep.

description: Add switchable yahr and lotus hyprlock themes with robust switcher copies

asi.hypothesis: Hyprlock is the next visible unported surface; adding theme snapshots and switching them with the same safe switcher should make lockscreen visuals consistent with yahr/lotus.
asi.bug_found: Initial attempts failed isolated switcher tests because active .config/hypr/hyprlock.conf was hardlinked/same-file after cp -a in the fake HOME, so cp source destination reported 'same file'.
asi.implementation_notes: Added .config/hypr/themes/yahr/hyprlock.conf using the yahr wallpaper, Eldritch palette, large clock/date/user labels, and 20px user label. Updated lotus hyprlock snapshot to use the local lotus wallpaper. switch-theme.sh now uses copy_config via mktemp+mv for all copied configs, including hyprlock, avoiding same-file cp failures.
asi.validation_result: Focused fake-HOME switcher debug passes for lotus and yahr; autoresearch.sh passes with hyprlock_switch_score=15 and port_score=515.
asi.user_impact: hyprlock now follows the selected lotus/yahr theme, and theme switching remains robust for Quickshell, Hyprland, hyprpaper, mako, and hyprlock.

description: Add lightweight switchable lotus and yahr wofi fallback themes

asi.hypothesis: The wofi fallback should match lotus/yahr but remain faster than the previous style by disabling images and CSS transitions while keeping readable 20px text.
asi.implementation_notes: Added .config/wofi/themes/yahr and lotus config/style snapshots; made yahr active; disabled allow_images, disabled CSS transitions/text shadows/box shadows, reduced launcher size, and wired switch-theme.sh to copy matching wofi config and style.css.
asi.validation_result: autoresearch.sh passed; fake-HOME switcher/toggle tests verify wofi config/style copies for lotus and yahr; wofi_switch_score=15 and port_score=530.
asi.user_impact: Super+Shift+Space wofi fallback now uses a lightweight theme matching the selected lotus/yahr theme and should feel faster than the previous image-heavy fallback.

description: Add switchable lotus and yahr Ghostty terminal palettes

asi.hypothesis: Ghostty is the primary terminal, so its palette should follow the selected lotus/yahr visual theme instead of staying on Atom One Dark.
asi.implementation_notes: Added .config/ghostty/themes/yahr/config with Eldritch foreground/background/cursor/palette and .config/ghostty/themes/lotus/config with a lotus/Atom palette. Made yahr active and wired switch-theme.sh to copy the selected Ghostty config. Fake-HOME switch/toggle tests now compare ghostty config copies.
asi.validation_result: autoresearch.sh passed; terminal_switch_score=15 and port_score=545.
asi.user_impact: New Ghostty windows now match the active lotus/yahr theme after running switch-theme.sh or toggle-theme.sh.

description: Add yahr calendar popup opened from the bar clock

asi.hypothesis: After core theming surfaces, a calendar popup is a useful upstream-style Quickshell feature that can be added without heavy dependencies by making it a standalone yahr widget launched from the clock.
asi.implementation_notes: Added .config/quickshell/themes/yahr/Calendar.qml with month grid, today highlight, previous/next/today controls, keyboard navigation, 20px readable text, and yahr palette. Bar.qml clock pill now opens current/Calendar.qml. Widget runtime validation now includes Calendar.
asi.validation_result: autoresearch.sh passed; Calendar standalone smoke test passes; widget_runtime_score increased to 25, calendar_widget_score=15, port_score=575.
asi.user_impact: Clicking the yahr bar clock opens a theme-matched calendar overlay with keyboard/mouse navigation.

description: Add yahr playerctl media popup and bar launcher

asi.hypothesis: A lightweight media popup is a useful upstream-style feature that can be added using installed playerctl without introducing a full control-center dependency.
asi.implementation_notes: Added .config/quickshell/themes/yahr/Media.qml with playerctl metadata polling, progress bar, play/pause/previous/next controls, keyboard shortcuts, and 20px yahr-styled text. Added a bar media module that opens current/Media.qml and right-click toggles play-pause.
asi.validation_result: autoresearch.sh passed; Media standalone smoke test passes; widget_runtime_score increased to 30, media_widget_score=15, port_score=605.
asi.user_impact: The yahr bar now has a media button for a themed playback overlay; right-click toggles play/pause directly.

description: Attempt yahr control center with helper shortcuts and system meters

asi.hypothesis: A control center/status popover can consolidate network, Bluetooth, audio, media, calendar, power, and system meters into a yahr-style upstream feature without new dependencies.
asi.rollback_reason: Although static control_center_score passed and primary score rose, widget_runtime_score did not increase after adding ControlCenter.qml, indicating the new standalone widget likely failed the Quickshell runtime smoke test. A new user-facing widget should not be kept until it loads cleanly.
asi.next_action_hint: Reimplement ControlCenter.qml with simpler QML bindings and avoid nested parent.parent property chains or fragile Process command quoting. Run a targeted quickshell smoke test for ControlCenter before the full autoresearch run.
asi.validation_result: Full autoresearch script passed overall, but the new widget was not counted as runtime-clean.

description: Add runtime-safe yahr control center with system helper shortcuts

asi.hypothesis: A simpler control center without fragile live status probing can consolidate system helper shortcuts and upstream-style widget entry points while passing runtime validation.
asi.implementation_notes: Added .config/quickshell/themes/yahr/ControlCenter.qml as a 6-tile yahr overlay for Network, Bluetooth, Audio, Media, Calendar, and Power. It uses installed helpers nm-connection-editor, blueman-manager, pavucontrol and launches theme-local current/Media.qml, Calendar.qml, and PowerMenu.qml. Added a bar gear module to open current/ControlCenter.qml.
asi.validation_result: Targeted quickshell smoke test for ControlCenter returned code 124 with Configuration Loaded and no QML errors. autoresearch.sh passed; widget_runtime_score increased to 35, control_center_score=15, port_score=635.
asi.user_impact: The yahr bar now has a themed control center for common desktop controls without adding dependencies.

description: Add direct Hyprland keybinds for yahr calendar, media, and control center widgets

asi.hypothesis: Calendar, media, and control center should not only be clickable from the bar; direct Hyprland keybinds make upstream-style widgets accessible even when the pointer is not on the bar.
asi.implementation_notes: Added Super+Shift+C for current/Calendar.qml, Super+Shift+M for current/Media.qml, and Super+Shift+S for current/ControlCenter.qml. The binds use theme-local current paths so they remain compatible with the theme switcher design.
asi.validation_result: autoresearch.sh passed; upstream_widget_keybind_score=10 and port_score=645.
asi.user_impact: The new yahr widgets are now accessible directly from the keyboard.

description: Polish yahr launcher, clipboard, and media widgets with empty states and help hints

asi.hypothesis: After core theming and upstream-style widgets are in place, the final polish pass should improve clarity by adding empty states and keyboard/help hints to the surfaces most likely to be empty or confusing.
asi.implementation_notes: AppLauncher now shows No applications found/No matches with launch hints when filtered is empty. Clipboard shows empty/no-match states with guidance. Media shows a no-active-player message and keyboard shortcut hint text. Updated autoresearch ideas backlog to leave only optional future features.
asi.validation_result: autoresearch.sh passed; polish_score=15 and port_score=660.
asi.user_impact: Launcher, clipboard, and media overlays now communicate what to do when there is no content and expose their keyboard controls.

description: Add yahr mako notification center with history and actions

asi.hypothesis: A yahr notification center can use installed makoctl JSON history/list commands to add upstream-style notification management without replacing mako or adding dependencies.
asi.implementation_notes: Added .config/quickshell/themes/yahr/Notifications.qml. It reads makoctl list -j and history -j through python3 JSON merging, shows active/history notifications, supports dismiss selected, restore, and clear all. Added bar notification button with right-click clear, control-center tile, and Super+Shift+N keybind.
asi.validation_result: Targeted quickshell smoke test for Notifications loads cleanly. autoresearch.sh passed; widget_runtime_score increased to 40, notification_center_score=15, port_score=680.
asi.user_impact: Notifications can now be browsed and managed from a yahr-styled overlay via the bar, control center, or keyboard.

description: Upgrade yahr control center with live system and media status

asi.hypothesis: The control center should become the richer live status surface requested by the user while staying dependency-light and runtime-safe.
asi.implementation_notes: ControlCenter.qml now polls CPU via /proc/stat, memory via /proc/meminfo, battery via /sys/class/power_supply, audio via wpctl, network via nmcli, Bluetooth via bluetoothctl, and media via playerctl. It displays CPU/memory/battery status cards and live subtitles on Network/Bluetooth/Audio/Media tiles, while preserving helper shortcuts.
asi.validation_result: Targeted ControlCenter smoke test loads cleanly. autoresearch.sh passed; live_status_score=15 and port_score=695.
asi.user_impact: The control center now gives a quick live overview of system and media state instead of only static shortcut labels.

description: Add MPRIS artwork support to the yahr media widget

asi.hypothesis: Deeper media integration should display MPRIS album artwork when players expose mpris:artUrl, while keeping a themed glyph fallback for players without art.
asi.implementation_notes: Media.qml now requests {{mpris:artUrl}}, normalizes local absolute paths to file:// URLs, stores artUrl, displays it with an asynchronous Image using PreserveAspectCrop in a larger artwork tile, overlays a subtle tint, and falls back to the yahr media glyph when no art is available.
asi.validation_result: Targeted Media smoke test loads cleanly. autoresearch.sh passed; media_artwork_score=15 and port_score=710.
asi.user_impact: The media overlay now shows album/video artwork for MPRIS players that provide it, making the widget feel closer to a full yahr media surface.

description: Replace too-dark yahr wallpaper and fix active hyprpaper theme consistency

asi.hypothesis: The user-visible black desktop is caused by the curated yahr wallpaper being too dark and active hyprpaper config being inconsistent/stale; replacing it with a brighter Eldritch asset and restoring direct yahr config should fix startup and switching visuals.
asi.bug_found: Active .config/hypr/hyprpaper.conf was a symlink to themes/lotus/hyprpaper.conf while containing yahr wallpaper content, and lotus hyprpaper/hyprlock snapshots had stale yahr references. The selected yahr PNG was also very dark/minimal.
asi.implementation_notes: Copied upstream Eldritch thumb-1920-443798.jpg into .config/quickshell/themes/yahr/wallpapers/eldritch.jpg, changed active and yahr hyprpaper configs to use it, restored lotus hyprpaper/hyprlock snapshots to lotus.jpg, updated yahr hyprlock to eldritch.jpg, and added wallpaper_visibility_score guarding against stale eldritch.png paths and symlinked active hyprpaper config.
asi.validation_result: autoresearch.sh passed; wallpaper_visibility_score=15 and port_score=725.
asi.user_impact: Yahr should now start with a visible teal Eldritch wallpaper instead of the nearly black octopus image, and lotus/yahr wallpaper switching is coherent again.

description: Make Ghostty theme switching non-blocking for Home Manager read-only configs

asi.hypothesis: Theme switching should not fail when Ghostty is managed by Home Manager/Nix store and lacks writable ~/.config/ghostty/themes snapshots; terminal theming should be best-effort while all other theme surfaces still switch.
asi.bug_found: Live ~/.config/ghostty points into a Nix store Home Manager output and has no themes/yahr/config. switch-theme.sh treated Ghostty as mandatory and exited before switching other surfaces.
asi.implementation_notes: switch-theme.sh now computes repo_config_home from its script path, falls back to repo Ghostty theme snapshots when live ~/.config/ghostty/themes is absent, and copies Ghostty config only when destination config is writable. If Ghostty is read-only or missing, it prints a warning and continues switching Quickshell, Hyprland, hyprpaper, hyprlock, mako, and wofi.
asi.validation_result: Live ~/.config/quickshell/switch-theme.sh yahr no longer errors; it prints a Ghostty skip warning and switches theme. autoresearch.sh passed with terminal_switch_score=15 and port_score=725.
asi.user_impact: Running switch-theme.sh yahr works on the current Nix/Home Manager setup instead of stopping at 'Ghostty theme not found'.
